name: causal-halting
description: A Codex skill, prompt guard, DesignIR verifier, trace analyzer, workflow adapter, and repair verifier for prediction-feedback loops.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and refactor prediction-feedback loops in agent systems.
interface.longDescription: Causal Halting packages a Codex skill, low-cost UserPromptSubmit context guard, CHC-0 reference notes, explicit graph checker, DesignIR-only verifier, deterministic trace analyzer, workflow adapter, repair workflow, and before/after repair verifier for separating structural prediction-feedback cycles from ordinary semantic undecidability. Natural language must be interpreted by the LLM into DesignIR before deterministic analysis.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this agent loop with CHC-0.
Check this halting-style graph for feedback.
Analyze this agent trace for current-run prediction feedback.
Repair this causal_paradox into a safe orchestrator boundary.
